summary: Tested Linktree-style public link page at /l/{username} and PWA background color fix. All backend APIs (10/10) passed. Frontend renders correctly with profile photo, name, bio, links, and branding footer. PWA fix confirmed - html and body have backgroundColor #000000.
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: GET /api/linkpage/public/{username} returns correct page data for forestward
PASS: GET /api/linkpage/user/{user_id} returns or auto-creates link page
PASS: PUT /api/linkpage/user/{user_id} updates link page settings correctly
PASS: Frontend /l/forestward displays profile photo, name (Forest Ward), company (i'M On social), bio (Sales Director)
PASS: Frontend shows links: Call Me, Email Me, My Digital Card, Leave a Review
PASS: Frontend shows branding footer 'powered by i'MOnsocial'
PASS: Frontend /l/nonexistent shows 'Page Not Found' message correctly
PASS: +html.tsx has html element backgroundColor #000000 (verified via computed style)
PASS: +html.tsx has body element backgroundColor #000000 (verified via computed style)
PASS: PWA meta tags present: apple-mobile-web-app-capable=yes, theme-color=#000000
PASS: CSS includes safe-area-inset-bottom for iOS home indicator area
context_for_next_testing_agent: Link page feature fully tested. Public page at /l/forestward displays correctly with profile photo, name, bio, links, and branding footer. Non-existent pages show 'Page Not Found' error. PWA fix verified - html and body elements have backgroundColor #000000 to prevent white bar at bottom on iOS standalone mode. Click tracking API works.

backend_404_handling.verification: pytest verified 404 with 'Page not found' detail

backend_user_link_page.verification: pytest verified get, update, and data persistence

backend_username_check.verification: pytest verified taken, available, and too-short usernames

backend_click_tracking.verification: pytest verified click tracking returns 'tracked' status

frontend_public_page_valid.verification: Playwright - all elements visible: photo, name, bio, links, footer

frontend_public_page_notfound.verification: Playwright - 'Page Not Found' and 'This link page doesn't exist yet' visible

pwa_meta_tags.test: PWA meta tags for iOS standalone mode
